rationale: The citing paper references Lambrecht and Tucker (2013) once as support for a narrow background claim that consumers may view personalized advertising positively. This citation appears in a brief conceptual discussion of possible consumer-level moderation, not as a core theoretical or empirical pillar of the brand safety framework. The paper does not build its hypotheses, design, measures, or analysis on the retargeting model from the cited study. So the role is a passing contextual mention rather than a meaningful directional dependence.
